purpose: QA-driven minimum rerun after the W72 0.41/0.60 and 0.43/0.60 micro-matrix. Uses a midpoint ControlNet strength of 0.415 to preserve the softer natural face/collar behavior from 0.41 while avoiding weaker edge adherence.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, natural skin texture with fine pores, subtle human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clean catchlights and visible iris detail, gently open eye shadows, detailed natural hair, edge-guided but natural composition, coherent face silhouette, clean but not over-sharpened jawline, separated neck and shirt collar, tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, calm plain continuous neutral interior background, seamless right image edge, no visible wall panel boundary, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, beauty filter skin, airbrushed face, porcelain skin, over-sharpened skin, gritty skin, over-sharpened edges, dark edge halos, harsh outlines, black contour stains, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, colored blotches, paint marks, dim eye sockets, over-dark eyes, underexposed eyes, muddy shadows, crushed shadows, smeared jawline, warped collar edge, control map stains, right-edge seam, vertical seam, background panel line, border artifact, edge strip, window band, light bar, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso

qa_focus: identity and face-shape stability against retained 0.42/0.60 candidate
